text: There is a feeling of curiosity in me as I look through the glass at the group absorbed in a presentation. I sense a boundary between inside and outside, belonging and observation. Moving towards the wall marked "R+D," I feel energized by the ideas of innovation and research swirling through the space. Here, amidst abstract displays and glowing screens, I feel small but thoughtful, as if participating in an unfolding story of discovery and progress. The juxtaposition of people thinking and technology evolving makes me reflect on humanity's relationship with knowledge and change.
